title: Undeclared Column Exposure in Relational Plan
vulnerability: Planner allows selecting columns not declared in the facade schema.
exploit_path: Untrusted SQL references hidden column and execution path returns value.
remediation: Validate all scan select/where/orderBy columns against schema before execution.
required_tests: Reject ORDER BY on undeclared columns

title: Post-Fetch Row Limit Enforcement
vulnerability: Row cap is enforced after expensive work in some fallback paths.
exploit_path: Attacker submits high-cardinality request that forces large intermediate materialization.
impact: Availability degradation and resource exhaustion risk.
remediation: Apply guardrails before executing expensive branches where feasible.
required_tests: Guardrail triggers on large fallback scans
Deterministic error returned for oversized requests
